title: Using host operating system namespaces is security-sensitive
description: Using host operating system namespaces is security-sensitiveAnalyze your codeintentionality-completesecuritySecurity HotspotdockercweUsing host operating system namespaces can lead to compromise of the host systems.These attacks would target:host processeshost inter-process communication (IPC) mechanismsnetwork services of the local host systemThese three items likely include systems that support either the internal operation of the Kubernetes cluster or the enterprise’s internal infrastructure.Opening these points to containers opens new attack surfaces for attackers who have already successfully exploited services exposed by containers. Depending on how resilient the cluster is, attackers can extend their attack to the cluster by compromising the nodes from which the cluster started the
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

noncompliant:
- name: Create a Pod
  kubernetes.core.k8s:
    state: present
    definition:
      apiVersion: v1
      kind: Pod
      metadata:
        name: example
      spec:
        containers:
          - name: web
            image: nginx
            ports:
              - name: web
                containerPort: 80
                protocol: TCP
        hostPID: true     # Sensitive
        hostIPC: true     # Sensitive
        hostNetwork: true # Sensitive
compliant:
- name: Create a Pod
  kubernetes.core.k8s:
    state: present
    definition:
      apiVersion: v1
      kind: Pod
      metadata:
        name: example
      spec:
        containers:
          - name: web
            image: nginx
            ports:
              - name: web
                containerPort: 80
                protocol: TCP
        hostPID: false
        hostIPC: false
        hostNetwork: false

checks.message: Kubernetes resource configuration - verify host namespaces are not enabled
hostPID: true grants access to host process namespace - security risk
hostIPC: true grants access to host IPC namespace - security risk
hostNetwork: true grants access to host network namespace - security risk
network_mode: host grants access to host network namespace - security risk
pid_mode: host grants access to host process namespace - security risk
ipc_mode: host grants access to host IPC namespace - security risk
